07 Feb 2024St. Unix Clown College for the Criminally InsaneHome of the UNIX-HATERS Federation
02 Feb 2024Why does HTML think “chucknorris” is a color?A fascinating rabbit hole involving CSS, colours, and random words.
02 Feb 2024Infinite CraftA super addictive game where you craft a variety of things by combining the four elements (earth, wind, fire, and water). Created by Neal Agarwal using a large language model called Llama 2
29 Jan 2024'Golfballia ambusta' and the tale of a fungus hoaxHow three burnt golf balls gave mycology a 'Dada moment' and possibly an existential crisis.
28 Jan 2024Please, don’t force me to log inJuha-Matti Santala points out a lot of services needing account logins for arbitrary reasons.
28 Jan 20241967 NFL Championship GameBecause of the adverse conditions in which the game was played, the rivalry between the two teams, and the game's dramatic climax, it has been immortalized as the Ice Bowl
